task_description: find the most common filename extension in the current directory tree
code:
echo "Finding the most common extension..."
head -n 1 extension_counts.txt
echo "Most common extension found."

trace.stdout:
Finding the most common extension...
   2395 py
Most common extension found.

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Starting to list files..."
find . -type f | awk -F. 'NF>1 {print $NF}' > extensions.txt
echo "File listing complete."
```

execution trace:
stdout:
Starting to list files...
File listing complete.


stderr:


return code: 0

```bash
echo "Counting extensions..."
sort extensions.txt | uniq -c | sort -nr > extension_counts.txt
echo "Extension counting complete."
```

execution trace:
stdout:

Extension counting complete.

